key_features: Tenant-scoped database operations with organizationId isolation
Full CRUD operations for Table entities
Soft delete enforcement via notDeleted helper
patterns: Repository pattern for data access layer
Parallel Promise.all() for count and find operations
Flexible where clause building with conditional spread operators

key_features: Business logic layer for table operations

patterns: Service pattern for zone domain logic
Potential integration with TableRepository for zone-table relationships

patterns_discovered.name: Tenant Isolation Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: All repository operations require organizationId parameter to enforce multi-tenant data isolation

patterns_discovered.name: Soft Delete Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Uses notDeleted helper in all where clauses to filter deleted records without physical deletion

patterns_discovered.name: Type-Safe Database Operations
patterns_discovered.description: Leverages Prisma.TableWhereInput and Prisma.TableOrderByWithRelationInput for compile-time type safety

patterns_discovered.name: Pagination Normalization
patterns_discovered.description: Normalizes page and perPage values with bounds checking before database queries

patterns_discovered.name: Conditional Property Spread
patterns_discovered.description: Uses conditional spread operators to build dynamic where/data clauses only for provided parameters

patterns_discovered.name: Parallel Query Execution
patterns_discovered.description: Uses Promise.all() to execute count and find operations simultaneously for performance

patterns_discovered.name: orThrow Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Provides findByIdOrThrow helper to reduce boilerplate null checks in services

gotchas_discovered.issue: perPage bounded to MAX_PER_PAGE=100 to prevent denial-of-service attacks via large limit requests
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Normalized values silently capped; clients should validate response page counts

gotchas_discovered.issue: numberExists() method accepts excludeId for update operations but relies on proper caller logic to use it
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Service layer must validate excludeId when updating existing tables

gotchas_discovered.issue: findByIdWithRelations includes orders with take: 10, which may cause N+1 issues if called in loops
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use query optimization in service layer; consider caching for bulk operations

gotchas_discovered.issue: TableStatus type imported but not enforced in update operations; casting via 'as TableStatus' at return
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Type definitions should ensure upstream data validation

gotchas_discovered.issue: createMany() accepts unlimited array length without validation
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Service layer should validate batch sizes or implement chunking

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created Table and Zone services with repository pattern implementation
key_accomplishments: Implemented comprehensive TableRepository with 20+ methods covering all CRUD operations
Established tenant-scoped data access layer with organizationId enforcement
Created type-safe database abstraction using Prisma with conditional query building
Implemented pagination with normalization and bounds checking
Added soft delete support through query filtering
Provided service layer abstraction (table.service.ts, zone.service.ts) over repository
approach_outcome.documentation: excellent - comprehensive JSDoc comments with examples

recommendations.recommendation: Add batch size validation to createMany() to prevent memory exhaustion
Consider adding database indexes for frequently filtered columns
recommendations.implementation: Add indexes on (organizationId, number), (organizationId, zoneId), (organizationId, status)

recommendations.recommendation: Add bulk update/delete operations to avoid N+1 patterns in service layer
recommendations.implementation: Add updateMany() and deleteMany() methods with transaction support

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive test suite covering tenant isolation, soft deletes, and pagination edge cases
recommendations.implementation: Add unit tests for boundary conditions (page=0, perPage=0, perPage>100)

recommendations.recommendation: Implement caching for findAllSummaries() used in dropdowns and floor plans
recommendations.implementation: Add optional cache layer with TTL for read-heavy operations

recommendations.recommendation: Eliminate 'as Type' casts by ensuring Prisma schema types align with domain types
recommendations.implementation: Review order.types.ts Table and TableWithRelations definitions

recommendations.recommendation: Add example error scenarios to JSDoc for methods that throw AppException
recommendations.implementation: Update JSDoc @throws sections with concrete error codes
